encumbrances.description: Cell tower lease (originally) recorded and later converted to a perpetual easement burdening the parcel. Withdraws an exclusive area from buildable use and adds a companion access/utility easement.
encumbrances.notes: Original lease income retained post-conversion. Tower height and exclusive footprint must be reflected in any rebuild scenario; access easement runs from Indian Queen Lane frontage to the tower pad.

encumbrances.description: Public right-of-way easement along the eastern lot boundary for stormwater management.
encumbrances.notes: City-owned ROW; cannot be vacated without council action.
